Drivers and functions for managing Micron N25Q flash memory operations, including core dump support.


## Files
- **[cd_flash_driver.c](cd_flash_driver.c.md)**: A flash driver for core dump support, implementing initialization, read, write, and erase operations.
- **[flash.c](flash.c.md)**: Driver for managing flash memory operations, including read, write, erase, and power management.
- **[flash_core.c](flash_core.c.md)**: Functions for initializing, configuring, and communicating with Micron N25Q flash memory via SPI.
- **[flash_private.h](flash_private.h.md)**: Header file for configuring and controlling the Micron N25Q flash memory via SPI on STM32 microcontrollers.
